name: Internet After Interfaces (deck)
description: A keynote manifesto on the post.ui web. Read-only public artifact. Quote freely with attribution.

capabilities.name: read_slide
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific slide's content via deep-link. URL pattern: /#{n} where n is 1..45.

endpoints.comment: This deck does not currently expose A2A or MCP endpoints. It is a read-only static artifact. To exercise the protocols, see the linked exhibits at immersivecommons.com.
